lede: Upright on shelf, sealed on all sides, printed in up to eight colours.
name: Stand-Up Pouches
intro: A stand-up pouch stays upright on shelf thanks to its bottom gusset, so your brand faces the shopper. Sealed sides protect the product, an optional press-to-close zipper adds reusability, and a choice of finishes and thicknesses tailors the pouch to what you pack.
metaDescription: Custom-printed stand-up pouches with bottom gusset, zipper option and matte, gloss or metallic finishes. 9 laminate structures incl. recyclable MDOPE/PE. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

anatomy.d: Press-to-close — keeps contents fresh after first open.
One-way valve lets fresh-roasted coffee breathe.
Rotogravure — matte, gloss or metallic finish.
Expands when filled — stands square on the shelf.

features.d: The bottom gusset expands when filled so the pouch stands and faces the shopper — no shelf tray needed.
Optional press-to-close zipper keeps contents fresh for repeat use.
Up to 8-colour rotogravure with matte, gloss or metallic finishes and spot effects.

lede: Press-to-close reseal beneath a tamper-evident top seal.
name: Zipper Pouches
intro: Zipper pouches add a press-to-close seal that turns single-use packaging into a resealable pack — ideal for products consumed over days or weeks. The zipper runs below a tamper-evident top seal, so the pack ships secure and opens easy.
metaDescription: Custom resealable zipper pouches with press-to-close closure and tamper-evident top seal. Rotogravure printed, 9 laminate structures, MOQ 500kg. Manufactured in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Press-to-close zipper keeps the pack fresh between uses — a clear on-shelf advantage.
A heat seal above the zipper ships the product secure until first open.
Zippers fit stand-up, flat-bottom and gusseted bodies alike.

lede: Gussets expand to hold more in a compact shelf footprint.
name: Gusseted Pouches
intro: Side- and bottom-gusset pouches expand to hold high volumes in a compact footprint, which is why they remain the workhorse pack for coffee, flour and grains. A back centre seal keeps the print faces clean, and a tin-tie or valve can be added on request.
metaDescription: Side and bottom gusseted pouches for coffee, flour and grains — high fill volume, back-seal, optional valve or tin-tie. Rotogravure printed, MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Side or bottom gussets open out to hold more in a slim shelf footprint.
A back centre seal keeps the front and back panels uninterrupted for branding.
One-way degassing valves and tin-ties can be fitted for roasted coffee.

lede: The economical pillow pack for high-speed form-fill-seal lines.
name: Centre Seal Pouches
intro: Also called pillow or fin-seal packs, centre-seal pouches are the most economical way to run high-speed, high-volume lines. A single back seam and top-and-bottom seals make them fast to fill and light on material — the default for snacks and namkeen.
metaDescription: Economical centre-seal (pillow / fin-seal) pouches for high-speed snack and namkeen lines. Back-seam, low material use, rotogravure printed. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Runs on vertical and horizontal form-fill-seal lines at high throughput.
A single back seam uses less film per pack — lower cost per unit.
Supplied as finished pouches or as printed roll stock for your own FFS line.

lede: High-barrier nylon/PE, air evacuated for a longer shelf life.
name: Vacuum Pouches
intro: Vacuum pouches use high-barrier nylon/PE structures that evacuate air to slow spoilage and extend shelf life. Puncture-resistant and freeze-safe, they are the standard for meat, seafood, cheese and other perishables.
metaDescription: High-barrier nylon/PE vacuum pouches for meat, seafood, cheese and perishables — puncture-resistant, freeze-safe, extended shelf life. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Air is evacuated and the high-barrier film locks out oxygen, slowing spoilage.
Nylon-based structures survive sharp bones, stacking and deep-freeze handling.
Stays flexible and seal-tight from freezer to display.

lede: Heavy-gauge, reinforced and resealable for bulk and refill packs.
name: Re-usable Pouches
intro: Heavy-gauge resealable pouches built for products bought in bulk and used over time — large pet-food packs, detergents and refill formats. Reinforced seals and carry features handle the weight; the zipper keeps the pack usable to the last serving.
metaDescription: Heavy-gauge re-usable resealable pouches for pet food, detergents and refill packs — reinforced seals, carry handles, zipper closure. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Reinforced K- or Doyen seals and optional die-cut handles hold heavy fills.
Durable zippers keep multi-week products fresh to the last use.
Lightweight refill formats cut cost and plastic versus rigid tubs.

lede: Three-side-sealed sachets for single-serve and sample formats.
name: 3-Side Seal Pouches
intro: Flat three-side-seal sachets are the go-to for single-serve and sample formats — sealed on three edges with one filling edge. Compact, low-cost and easy to strip off a line, they suit spices, ORS, condiments and trial packs.
metaDescription: Flat 3-side seal sachets for single-serve and sample packs — spices, ORS, condiments, trial sizes. Economical, rotogravure printed, MOQ 500kg. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Compact flat format ideal for one-use doses and samples.
Easy-tear notches let consumers open without scissors.
Minimal material and fast filling keep unit costs down at volume.

lede: Sealed on all four edges for a flat, premium presentation.
name: 4-Side Seal Bags
intro: Four-side-seal bags are sealed on all four edges for a flat, premium presentation and a strong, even seal all round. The format suits face masks, wet wipes, pharma and any product that benefits from a clean, framed front panel.
metaDescription: Flat 4-side seal bags with all-round sealing for face masks, wipes and pharma — premium presentation, strong seals. Rotogravure printed, MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Sealed on all four sides for a clean, framed panel and a quality feel.
Even sealing on every edge protects liquids, gels and wipes.
Consistent fill volumes for cosmetic and pharma single-serves.

lede: A reinforced die-cut handle keeps heavy packs easy to carry.
name: Patch Handle Bags
intro: Patch-handle bags add a reinforced die-cut carry handle to larger packs, so heavy fills stay easy to lift and shop. Common for pet food, flour and charcoal, they combine a big print canvas with real carry strength.
metaDescription: Patch-handle bags with reinforced die-cut carry handle for pet food, flour and charcoal — heavy fills, big print canvas. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: A reinforced patch handle spreads load so heavy packs lift cleanly.
Big front and back panels for high-impact retail branding.
Stands or stacks for both shelf display and bulk floor placement.

lede: Welded spout and screw cap for pourable, resealable liquids.
name: Spout Pouches
intro: Spout pouches carry a welded spout and screw cap for pourable, resealable liquid packaging — juices, sauces, baby food and energy gels. Leak-proof spout welds and burst-tested seals let them replace bottles at a fraction of the plastic.
metaDescription: Leak-proof spout pouches with welded spout and cap for juice, sauces, baby food and energy gels — burst-tested, resealable. Rotogravure printed, MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: A screw-cap spout makes the pack pourable and reclosable.
Spout welds and seals are burst-strength tested for liquids.
Delivers the same convenience as a bottle with far less plastic and freight.

lede: Printed roll stock, slit to exact reel widths for your FFS line.
name: Poly Film Rolls
intro: Printed laminate roll stock supplied to exact reel widths for your own form-fill-seal lines. Tension-controlled slitting delivers clean, ready-to-run reels — the same print and barrier as our pouches, converted on your machines.
metaDescription: Printed laminate poly film rolls (roll stock) for FFS lines — exact reel widths, tension-controlled slitting, food-grade barrier structures. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Printed, laminated reels slit to your exact FFS web width.
Precision winding gives clean, defect-free roll stock.
Identical print and barrier structures as our finished pouches.

lede: Survives steam sterilisation up to 121°C for shelf-stable meals.
name: Retort Pouches
intro: Retort pouches are engineered to survive steam sterilisation up to 121°C, giving shelf-stable ready meals, curries and gravies months of ambient life without refrigeration. High-barrier PET/Alu/CPP structures hold seal integrity through the retort cycle.
metaDescription: Retort pouches sterilisable to 121°C for shelf-stable ready meals, curries and gravies — PET/Alu/CPP high-barrier, ambient shelf life. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Withstands full steam-retort processing without seal failure.
Delivers months of shelf-stable life with no cold chain.
PET/Alu/CPP laminates block oxygen, light and moisture.

lede: Micro-perforation lets fresh produce breathe and stay crisp.
name: Breathing Pouches
intro: Micro-perforated breathing pouches let produce respire so fresh fruit, vegetables and grains stay crisp longer. Controlled perforation manages moisture and gas exchange — the modified-atmosphere answer for fresh and semi-fresh products.
metaDescription: Micro-perforated breathing pouches for fresh produce, rice and grains — controlled respiration and moisture management for longer freshness. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Controlled micro-perforation manages gas exchange to slow spoilage.
Reduces condensation and fog for a cleaner pack on shelf.
Extends the sellable window for respiring fruit, veg and grains.

name: Shape Pouches
lede: Die-cut into custom silhouettes beyond the standard rectangle.
intro: Die-cut into custom silhouettes beyond the standard rectangle — animals, characters, product outlines and seasonal shapes that make a pack stand out on a crowded shelf. Popular for confectionery, kids' brands and gifting formats.
metaDescription: Custom die-cut shape pouches in bespoke silhouettes — animals, characters, product outlines and seasonal shapes. 9-colour rotogravure, 9 laminate structures incl. recyclable MDOPE/PE, zipper optional. MOQ 500kg, made in Bharuch, Gujarat.

features.d: Any outline within tooling limits — not boxed into a standard rectangle or gusset.
Distinctive shape catches the eye before the print or branding even registers.
Full choice of laminate structures — shape doesn't compromise protection.
